title: rhinanthus pampaninii subsp. simplex
intro: Rhinanthus pampaninii subsp. simplex is a subspecies of the Rhinanthus pampaninii plant, commonly known as a species of flowering plant in the broomrape family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhinanthus pampaninii subsp. simplex include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
